text: Premium Rwanda Coffee — Direct from Farm to You

Studex Wildlife supplies premium Rwandan A1/A2 green coffee to hotels, restaurants, and distributors across the UAE and South Africa. Every batch is traceable to the farm, Rainforest Alliance certified, and shipped direct.
Our Coffee — What You Get
Rwanda A1 Grade — Screen 15+, cup score 85+. Washed process. Floral, citrus, black tea notes.
Rwanda A2 Grade — Screen 14+. Natural/double-washed. Caramel, stone fruit, full body.
Traceability — GPS-verified farms in Nyamasheke & Rusizi districts, Western Rwanda.
Certifications — Rainforest Alliance, UTZ, Fair Trade (select cooperatives).
Packaging — GrainPro + jute, 60kg bags. Private label available from 1MT.
UAE Market — Why Rwandan Coffee Wins

Dubai's hospitality sector consumes 180M+ cups annually. Hotel groups (Marriott, Hilton, Jumeirah) now mandate traceable, ethically-sourced coffee in their procurement policies. Rwanda's Rainforest Alliance certification is a direct entry ticket. Studex Wildlife has the sourcing relationships and logistics infrastructure to supply UAE buyers directly — cutting out 2-3 distributor layers.
UAE buyers pay USD $4,800–$7,200/MT for Rwanda A1. We source at $3,200–$4,000/MT FOB Kigali. Margin opportunity: $1,600–$3,000/MT for the right distributor.
South Africa Market — The Boutique Hotel Opportunity

SA's specialty coffee market is growing 15% YoY. Independent boutique hotels in Sandton, Cape Town, and the Winelands are actively seeking direct-trade suppliers with authentic African origin stories. Rwanda fits perfectly on a 'locally sourced' menu — a premium positioning these properties use to differentiate.
SA boutique buyers pay R85–R140/kg for premium green. Our landed cost is R52–R68/kg. The margin window for direct-trade specialty roasters is strong.

caption: Prices indicative — EXW Kigali. Sea freight to Jebel Ali ~$800/MT. To Durban ~$600/MT.

text: Supply Chain & Delivery
Lead time: 4–6 weeks from order confirmation to port of discharge.
Ports: Dubai (Jebel Ali), Durban (SA), Maputo (backup).
Documentation: Bill of lading, phytosanitary certificate, certificate of origin, cupping report included.
Samples: 250g sample sachets available for $25 — credited against first order.
